title: Saucy Stir Fry with Crispy Tomatoes
description: A quick and easy stir-fry recipe with crispy tomatoes and a savory sauce. This dish is perfect for a weeknight dinner.

ingredients.name: stir-fry oil
ingredients.notes: such as vegetable or peanut oil

ingredients.name: sauce (homemade or store-bought)
ingredients.notes: such as stir-fry sauce or hoisin sauce

instructions: Heat the stir-fry oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the garlic and ginger and stir-fry for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the chopped sun-dried tomatoes and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes, until crispy.
Add the soy sauce, sauce, sugar (if using), salt, and pepper. Stir-fry for 1-2 minutes, until the sauce is bubbly and slightly thickened.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Serve the stir-fry hot, garnished with crispy fried onions (if using).
Optional: garnish with chopped fresh herbs, such as green onions or cilantro.
